session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of changes:
**Moved:** - `.claude/commands/erk/consolidate-learn-plans-plan.md` → `.claude/commands/erk/system/consolidate-learn-plans-plan.md`

**Created documentation:** - `docs/learned/commands/system-folder-convention.md` — documents when commands belong in `system/`, with a tripwire for CI-only commands created outside the folder
**Regenerated indexes** via `erk docs sync` (3 files updated)
